summary: Comprehensive testing of Quest of Honor RPG game - All 33 backend API tests passed, frontend UI flows working correctly including registration, character creation, game world rendering, and all keyboard controls/panels.
critical_code_review_comments: GameWorld.jsx is 8000+ lines - consider splitting into smaller modules for maintainability
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with UUID prefixes for each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Auth (register/login), Character creation, Game world 3D rendering, WASD movement, Minimap, World Map (M key), Quest Log (L key), Inventory (I key), Character Panel (C key), Skills Panel (K key), Spell Book (P key), World Builder (F1), Enemy Editor (F3), Quest Maker (F7). Backend APIs fully tested with pytest.

frontend_ui: 3D game world with Three.js terrain rendering
World Map (M key) with player position
Character Panel (C key) with equipment slots
Quest Maker (F7) with objectives and rewards

test_credentials: Dynamic test users created with pattern: test_{uuid}@test.com / testpass123
